stateKeys.name: txId
stateKeys.type: string, payment transaction id ('' until charged)

stateKeys.name: cancelReason
stateKeys.type: string, why the order ended early ('' otherwise)

dataFields.itemsAvailable: boolean - whether all items are in stock

specialRules.name: cancel-blocked-while-charging
specialRules.note: CANCEL while orderState == 'charging' is rejected (reason = this rule's name): a charge decision has been emitted and must resolve before the order can end.

specialRules.name: stale-completions-reject
specialRules.note: Charge/shipment completions and timer expiries arriving in any state other than the one that awaits them are observable rejections (post == pre), never faults — this is what makes at-least-once delivery and stale timers safe.

noOpRule: An action that does not apply in the current state is reject(reason) — an observable no-op with post == pre.
